title: Dungeons and Taverns Mineshaft Overhaul
description: A Structure Datapack Overhauling and Replacing the Vanilla Mineshaft, Mesa Mineshaft and adding 4 New rare Mineshafts to your world
body:
This datapack, ported to the mod loaders Fabric, Forge and NeoForge, replaces the vanilla mineshaft and vanilla mesa mineshafts with jigsaw structures which overhaul the dirt room, add a mainline mineshaft and sideline mineshafts, side rooms, caved in mineshaft tunels, storage rooms, and ore deposits. 

It additionally adds mineshafts to the jagged and snowy peaks
the stoney peaks
and any surface biome (this one spawns very rare, about as rare as woodland mansions, if they could spawn in any biome)

Each Mineshaft version has a specific Ore type they replace 1% of all the stone/deepslate they tunnel through.

<details>
<summary>Which Mineshaft generates what ore?</summary>

Normal Mineshafts: Iron
Mesa Mineshafts: Gold
Jagged Mineshafts: Redstone
Stoney Mineshafts: Emeralds
Surface Mineshafts: Coal

</details>
<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>

Due to the limitation of it being a jigsaw structure, they cant dynamically adabt to where within a cave they spawn, and will only generate wooden supports, never chains. this may cause some visual issues that look quite uncanny. my deepest regrets for this.
It is also limited by not being able to not generate through water and stone aquifiers. for that case it will still burrow through them, but create a stone shell
The Mineshafts that spawn in the mountains, surface and Mesa , do not generate bridges, wich can cause floating rails to generate, and Minecart chests don't spawn in them, otherwise they would just float mid air and fall down.

</details>



I still hope this is an enjoyable experience despite Jigsaw Structures Shortcommings
